ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., application/pdf) */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (draft, published, archived) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the meeting */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_documents" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "presentation_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the document is presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id", "doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., board member, administrator, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the document was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
column_names: Size of the document in bytes
ID of the user who authored the document
Status of the document (draft, published, archived)
ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure)
Order in which the document is presented
Role of the user (e.g., board member, administrator, public)
Last login date and time of the user
Indicates if the user account is active
